title: Community Garden Minutes
text:
## Community Garden Minutes

**Meeting called by:** {person}

**Main topic:** The {adjective} mystery of missing {plural noun} from plot {number}.

**Witness report:** A {adjective} {animal} was seen carrying a {object} toward the {place} while {verb ending in -ing}.

**New rules:**
- Label every {food}
- Stop using {adjective} compost after dark
- Never {verb} near the sprinkler shed

**Next meeting:** Bring one {color} chair and a {adverb} prepared apology.
